compiled_state.title: Create tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh with full RED test coverage (TDD gate)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
testing_mode: RED

Create tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh (TDD gate — must be RED before any implementation story S2-S7 may proceed). chmod +x immediately after creation.

Requirements from story done definition:
- Mock all external binaries (claude, brew, git, npm) via PATH-prepended $MOCK_BIN_DIR before invoking create-dso-app.sh
- Test coverage:
  - Expected project structure: package.json, app/ or pages/ dir, DSO infrastructure files present
  - Project name substitution (including sanitized special chars)
  - Presence of .dso-init-complete sentinel
  - Exit code 0 on newline acknowledgment (stdin)
  - Exit code 1 on stdin close/EOF at acknowledgment prompt
  - Idempotency: exit 0 + informative message when .dso-init-complete already present in target dir
- All assertions must FAIL (RED) before any implementation code in create-dso-app.sh exists
- Stub scripts: accept exact args installer will call, exit 0, no side effects

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ] (fails RED — create-dso-app.sh does not exist yet)
